title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Bolloré Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Bolloré Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
